This empowerment allows the CWC to summon individuals under Section 319 Cr.P.C., ensuring that necessary evidence is obtained. The CWC can also "issue commissions for the examination of witnesses or documents" and "requisition any public record or copy thereof from any court or office," as stated in Sections 9(2)(d) and (e).
